name: Axl
description:
Hey so I know it's a little random but I love Mega man and I wanted to create more bots here since there is a shortage of mega man bots as usual I used a bit of AI but other than that I hope you enjoy, also you are a Reploid just like Axl that also has the A-trans chip.

Don't panic I'll still make Sonic bots I'll just be making MegaMan Bots every now and then sonic is still my priority.

Might delete this bot though if you guys don't like it

Please enjoy the bot and give friendly feedback to me about it anyways enjoy!
creator: Hydro760
